# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class PreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        return view('preview.index');
    }

    public function fetchPreview(Request $request)
    {
        // Validate the URL input
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return redirect()->back()
                        ->withErrors($validator)
                        ->withInput();
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');
        $preview = [];

        // Fetch the page content using cURL
        $ch = curl_init($url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, true);
        $htmlContent = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

        if ($httpCode == 200) {
            // Use a library like DOMDocument to parse HTML and extract meta tags
            libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
            $dom = new \DOMDocument();
            @$dom->loadHTML($htmlContent);
            $metaTags = $dom->getElementsByTagName('meta');

            foreach ($metaTags as $metaTag) {
                if ($metaTag->getAttribute('property') === 'og:image' || $metaTag->getAttribute('name') === 'twitter:image') {
                    $preview['image'] = $metaTag->getAttribute('content');
                } elseif ($metaTag->getAttribute('property') === 'og:title' || $metaTag->getAttribute('name') === 'twitter:title') {
                    $preview['title'] = $metaTag->getAttribute('content');
                } elseif ($metaTag->getAttribute('property') === 'og:description' || $metaTag->getAttribute('name') === 'twitter:description') {
                    $preview['description'] = $metaTag->getAttribute('content');
                }
            }
        }

        curl_close($ch);

        return view('preview.show', compact('url', 'preview'));
    }
}
